creator: patovm04@gmail.com
text:
New update on this. It seems it was even simpler hahaha.

Actually you don't need to mount /var/run/user, you only need to correct the symlink on /compat/ubuntu/var/run to fix sound issues.

rm /compat/ubuntu/var/run
cd /compat/ubuntu/var && ln -s ../run run

That's all apparently ;)
